block_03: Moqabala garam honay laga hay kiyun kay traders achai ranking lene kay liey khail rehe hain tak kay unko hisa mill sakay$5000 kay cash prize main aur jeetnay kay liey Asia ka no.1 trader.
block_04: 2nd round kuch he dino main shuru ga , July 6 ko — yhe break leney ka samay nahi hay, ubhi samay hay aur bhi achi trading ka, aur dosray traders ko dikhany ka kay app mosam ka haal batanay nahi aie hain!
block_06: June 29-August 2, 2020, hum aoyajan karian gay 4 muft tournaments ka,aik tournment aik haftay main. Har muft tournament main 20 winners hun gay jinko ticket milay ga akhri battle main hisa lene ka jis ka prize money 5000$ hay.
